docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND SETTLEMENT HEARING HEARING SET FOR MAR-24-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-29-2010 - A NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WAS FILED IN THIS CASE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOO, WILBUR AS TRUSTEE OF THE WOO FAMILY TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMONTON, BENJI AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2774 FRANKLIN STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO $1,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOC

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-24-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
